description: ToolsWindow crashes with AttributeError when calling self.tabs from Health report.
resolution: Use self.tab_content and self._on_tab_pill_clicked(index) instead. The UI uses custom GlowButton navigation pills, not a standard QTabWidget.

content: Unified 'Glow' pill navigation for tool windows.

name: Artist Usage Split
description: The Artists management table splits usage counts into 'Songs' and 'Albums' columns for better visibility of orphan types.
GlowButton was throwing 'cannot design property' errors because pyqtProperty(QIcon) lacked a setter.
resolution: Added @icon.setter to button.py to allow writing icons via the property system.
